evals.prompt: hey can you check the last 15 commits on master and tell me which ones should be backported to our stable branches? I need to know which bugs are critical or high priority
evals.expected_output: A structured report showing: (1) list of maintained stable branches from series_status.yaml, (2) commits with Critical/High bugs from Launchpad, (3) which branches need each commit, (4) cherry-pick commands, (5) excluded commits with reasons

evals.prompt: I need to figure out what commits from the last 2 months should go to stable/2024.1. Can you analyze commits since march 1st 2024 and show me the backport candidates? Also let me know if any are already backported
evals.expected_output: A report filtered for commits since 2024-03-01, showing: (1) commits that qualify for backport based on bug priority, (2) which are already in stable/2024.1, (3) which still need backporting, (4) summary statistics

evals.prompt: what needs backporting since the 2023.2 release? check all commits between that tag and HEAD, verify bug priorities in launchpad, and give me a breakdown by stable branch with the cherry-pick commands i need to run
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive report showing: (1) commits between 2023.2 tag and HEAD, (2) bug references parsed from commit messages, (3) Launchpad API queries for bug priorities, (4) backport candidates grouped by target branch, (5) executable cherry-pick command sequences
